author: jsign
content:
New release of zkEVM specs & tests: [zkevm@v0.3.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.1).

TL;DR:
- Invalid blocks filling is now supported
- New test for a 7702 border case and 12 new tests for `executionWitness.state` field
- A guest program spec bug fix related uncovered by the new `executionWitness.state` tests.

More details in the release description -- in particular I recommend looking at the last bullet point.
